title: Floating-point numbers, representation and manipulation
summary: 9618 A Level — IEEE-style mantissa and exponent, normalisation, and precision limits.
learningObjectives: Convert denary numbers to floating-point binary.

simpleExplanation.title: Real numbers in binary
simpleExplanation.summary: Floating-point stores mantissa and exponent. Normalisation maximises precision for a given bit allocation.
steps: Normalise: one non-zero digit before binary point.
Rounding causes small errors in calculations.

sections.content: **Floating-point** (13.3) extends AS **1.1** representation. Show **binary working** — examiners award method marks.
